import sentry_sdk


def process_webhook(payload: dict) -> dict:
    try:
        result = handle_payload(payload)
        return {"status": "ok"}
    except Exception:
        sentry_sdk.capture_exception()
        return {"status": "error"}


def sync_user(user_id: str) -> dict:
    try:
        data = external_api.get_user(user_id)
        return save_user(data)
    except Exception:
        sentry_sdk.capture_exception()
        raise


def process_payment(order_id: str, amount: float) -> dict:
    try:
        return charge(amount)
    except PaymentError:
        sentry_sdk.capture_exception()
        raise
